data.body: Lock files (repo.lock, cache.lock, write_queue_worker.lock) are being left behind with 0 bytes, suggesting the kno process is being killed before Drop runs. v0.7.3 adds PID-based stale lock detection which handles the symptom, but the root cause of why processes are dying ungracefully needs investigation. Likely an editor plugin or hook with a short timeout force-killing kno.
data.title: Investigate orphaned lock files on macOS
